title.index.description: Main title on the subsites management homepage

title.create.description: Title of the dialog for creating a new subsite

title.openNow.description: Dialog title asking if the user wants to open the subsite immediately after creation

field.slug.description: Label for subsite slug input field

field.origin.description: Domain column in the subsite list

field.actions.description: Actions column in the subsite list

placeholder.slug.description: Placeholder for the slug input field

placeholder.title.message: Displayed in browser tab and site header
placeholder.title.description: Placeholder for the title input field

message.indexTip.message: Create independent brand subsites under the main site. Each subsite can have its own logo, title, and features without setting up separate source code.
message.indexTip.description: Explanation on the subsite management homepage

message.empty.message: You haven't created any subsites yet. Click 'Create Subsite' at the top right to start.

message.slugTip.message: 3–32 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens; cannot start or end with a hyphen or contain consecutive hyphens.

message.slugInvalid.message: Invalid subdomain prefix. Please check the rules and try again.

message.zoneMissing.message: The main site has not configured a subsite domain zone. Contact the site administrator.

message.createFailed.message: Failed to create subsite. Please try again later.

message.slugTaken.message: Subdomain {origin} is already in use. Please choose another.
message.slugTaken.description: Slug already taken during creation (backend code=duplication)

message.openNowConfirm.message: Subsite {origin} has been created. Open it now to continue configuration?
message.openNowConfirm.description: Prompt to open subsite immediately after creation

title.domains.description: Title of the custom domain dialog

title.bindDomain.description: Title of the domain binding form

button.domains.description: Button to open the domain management dialog

button.verify.description: Check if the domain resolves and issue certificate via reverse proxy

field.hostname.description: Input field for domain or subdomain you own

message.domainsIntro.message: Bind domains you own to this subsite. You need to be able to modify the domain's DNS. Add a CNAME as instructed below and click 'Verify Now'. We will automatically issue and renew a free HTTPS certificate via Let's Encrypt.

message.domainsEmpty.message: No custom domains bound yet. Enter a full domain in the form below and click 'Bind' to start.

message.hostnameTip.message: Must be a public domain you control via DNS.

message.hostnameInvalid.message: Invalid domain format. Must be a public resolvable domain; IP addresses are not allowed.

message.domainCreated.message: Domain submitted. Please add the CNAME record as instructed.

message.domainCreateFailed.message: Failed to create domain. Please try again later.

message.domainsLoadFailed.description: Failed to fetch the domain list

message.domainActive.message: Domain is live! Your subsite is now accessible via your custom HTTPS address.

message.domainVerifyFailed.message: Verification failed. Please check if the CNAME record points to our reverse proxy and DNS propagation is complete.

message.domainDeleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to unbind {hostname}? Users will no longer access your subsite via this domain after unbinding.

status.pending.description: Pending status label: waiting for user to add CNAME and click 'Verify Now'
